sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the established template (objectif pragmatique + grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. First B2 unit: full past-tense synthesis + passé simple / passé antérieur (recognition) + accord des participes passés synthesis incl. faire + infinitive invariable. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego B2 (Hachette), Dossier 1 'Racines' (les temps du passé; l'accord des participes passés; thème: identité, origines, immigration). Source PDF is scanned; grammar pages read visually (pp.16-17). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
